name: Golden Caramel Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix powdered sugar and margarine until well combined. Add flour and stir until a dough forms.
3. Press the dough evenly into an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan.
4. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
5. While the first layer is baking, mix together the granola, brown sugar, remaining flour, vanilla, baking powder, salt, and eggs.
6. Spread the mixture over the baked caramel layer.
7. Continue baking for 18-20 minutes or until the edges are browned.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
9. Cut into bars, approximately 3 x 1 inches.
